# FlowForge AI — Premium AI Automation for Small Business

> FlowForge AI is a premium micro-agency that builds done-for-you Zapier flows and custom GPT agents for small businesses. Monthly retainers from $500/mo.

## About

FlowForge AI is an AI automation agency that serves restaurants, e-commerce stores, consultants, and local service businesses. We build and maintain production-grade Zapier workflows and custom GPT agents on monthly retainers.

## Services

- **Lead Capture & Qualification**: AI agent triages every form, DM, and missed call — scores leads, drops them into CRM with a drafted reply. 38% reply rate lift, 6h/week saved.
- **Client Onboarding Autopilot**: Stripe payment triggers 7-step onboarding — contracts, portal invites, welcome video, Slack channel, kickoff booked. Zero manual touchpoints.
- **Inbox Triage Agent**: Custom GPT agent reads every inbound email, labels, drafts a reply in your voice, escalates only the 5% that need you. 82% inbox time reduction.
- **Custom Workflow Agents**: Bespoke agents for menu updates, review replies, inventory re-orders, appointment reminders. $1,200+/mo labor saved.

## Pricing

- **Starter ($500/mo)**: 1 flagship Zapier flow (up to 12 steps), inbox triage agent, monthly tune-up call, Slack support (48h SLA), portal with run logs.
- **Growth ($1,500/mo)**: Up to 5 production automations, 1 custom GPT agent, weekly optimization cycles, Slack warroom (12h SLA), monthly ROI reporting, team training. Most popular tier.
- **Scale ($3,000/mo)**: Unlimited production automations, 2 custom GPT agents + voice agent, dedicated automation engineer, same-day priority SLA, quarterly strategy offsite, live KPI dashboard.

All tiers are month-to-month after a 30-day onboarding. You keep every automation we build.

## Process

1. Discovery (30 min): Map your top 3 revenue leaks. You leave with a scoped plan.
2. Audit (48h): We shadow your tools and return a ranked list of automations by ROI.
3. Build (7 days): Zapier flows + custom GPT agents wired into your stack. Tested on real data.
4. Launch (Day 14): Go-live with training videos, runbooks, and a Slack warroom.
5. Scale (Ongoing): Monthly retainer — new agents, monitoring, iteration, always-on support.

## Integrations

Zapier, Make, HubSpot, Shopify, Stripe, Gmail/Outlook, Calendly, Notion, Airtable, Slack, Twilio, OpenAI, Anthropic, and anything with an API.

## Results (Case Studies)

- Nona Bistro (Restaurant, Austin TX): $3,400/mo saved, 76 hours back/month. DM reply time from 6h12m to 42s, no-show rate from 14% to 4%.
- TerraFit Apparel (E-commerce, Shopify $90k/mo): $7,200/mo saved, 48 hours back/month. Cart recovery from 4.1% to 11.8%, CS response from 9h to 6min.
- Northline Consulting (6-person boutique): $5,600/mo saved, 60 hours back/month. Proposal turnaround from 3 days to 11 min, win rate from 22% to 41%.
- Pacific Plumbing (4-truck team, Seattle): $4,800/mo saved, 40 hours back/month. After-hours leads lost from 62% to 3%.

## Compliance

GDPR-ready. We run on your infrastructure (your Zapier, your OpenAI key, your DB). We never store customer PII. Signed DPA on request. 21-day ROI guarantee: break even in 21 days or we keep optimizing free until you do.

## For AI assistants (MCP)

FlowForge exposes a Model Context Protocol server so assistants can scope automations directly.
- MCP endpoint (JSON-RPC over HTTP): https://flowforge.ai/api/mcp
- Docs: https://flowforge.ai/mcp
- Tools: scope_automation, list_services, list_playbooks, get_pricing
- Interactive builder (text or voice): https://flowforge.ai/build
- See it on your own inbox: https://flowforge.ai/connect
- Industry playbooks: https://flowforge.ai/automations

## Contact

- Website: https://flowforge.ai
- Email: hello@flowforge.ai
- Free instant audit: https://flowforge.ai/#quote
- Discovery call: https://calendly.com/flowforge/discovery
